testcase.name: whenSave_thenFindById

Hibernate: select b1_0.id,b1_0.created_at,b1_0.temperature,b1_0.weathercode,b1_0.windspeed,b1_0.industry,b1_0.ready_for_retainer,b1_0.revenue_range,b1_0.score,b1_0.updated_at,b1_0.url,b1_0.user_id from blueprints b1_0 where b1_0.id=? and b1_0.user_id=?
